emotional_tone: Grounded, reliable, scientific yet accessible, natural.

headings.usage_rules: Use tracking-tight for all H1 and H2. Keep sizes constrained (max text-5xl for hero/dashboard titles).

body.usage_rules: Use for all data tables, form inputs, and regular text. Provides high legibility for technical data.

mono.usage_rules: Use for data values (N, P, K, pH) and model confidence scores to ensure alignment.

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use gap-6 or gap-8 for dashboard bento grids.
layout.dashboard_structure: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. The main crop recommendation gets col-span-2 row-span-2. Form inputs take a sticky sidebar or col-span-1.

components.cards: Subtle roundness (rounded-xl max 12px). Use 1px subtle border (border-border). Avoid heavy shadows; use shadow-sm or flat solid backgrounds.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI standard inputs but styled with rounded-lg. Active/Focus state must ring with primary color (ring-primary/20).
components.buttons: Primary buttons use deep forest green (#2D4A22) with white text. Hover state slightly lighter. Rounded-lg. Include transition-all duration-200.
components.charts: Use Recharts. Style tooltips to match card styling (white bg, 1px border, shadow-sm).
components.chatbot: Floating action button in the bottom right or a collapsible side panel. Use a distinct subtle highlight for AI messages (e.g., bg-[#F1EFE7]).

motion.transitions: transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out for buttons and links.
motion.loading: Use an organic pulsing effect or a minimalist spinner (lucide-react Loader2) tinted primary.

media.description: Lush green agricultural farm field at golden hour. Use as a subtle backdrop or hero image overlay with bg-white/80 on top for readability.
media.instructions: Place in the main dashboard header or landing wrapper. Ensure high opacity overlay if text sits on it.

media.description: Studio shot of fresh assorted harvested crops on a sand textured background.
media.instructions: Use as a fallback image for 'Crop Info Cards' or generic ML recommendation thumbnails.

media.description: Close up of person holding dirt in their hand.
media.instructions: Can be used in the 'Soil/Weather Data Input Form' section as a decorative side image.

media.description: White and black truck on green grass field.
media.instructions: Use for logistics or alternative crop sections.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Do not use pure gray. Tint neutrals with the primary hue (e.g., green-tinted grays).
accessibility.focus: All form inputs (N, P, K, etc.) MUST have a clear focus ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using React + Tailwind + Shadcn UI.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for complex bento grids.
Implement the ML feature to accept N, P, K, temp, humidity, pH, rainfall and output prediction.
Display prediction confidence score prominently using a progress bar or circular ring.
Integrate Recharts to show 'Crop Price Trends'. Use the chart_palettes defined.
Use 'lucide-react' for all icons (e.g., Sprout, Droplet, Thermometer, Wind, MessageCircle).
Implement the Chatbot using Emergent LLM. Place it accessibly.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all form inputs, submit buttons, and recommendation cards (e.g., data-testid='predict-button', data-testid='npk-input').
